reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion no solo en despacho de combustible, sino tambien taller mecanico  lubticantes, gomeria.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service not only at the fuel station, but also at the mechanical workshop, lubricants, and tire shop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKbmRqSW5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros es muy buena es una pena que la calidad de la nafta no sea buena , en esta sucursal sola me paso que al ponerle nafta a mi auto fallaba como que tenía agua . No sé si les inunda los tanques o que pero algún problema con el agua están teniendo .

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendants is very good; it's a shame the gasoline quality isn't good. At this particular station, I had an issue where my car misfired, as if it had water in it. I don't know if their tanks are flooding or what, but they're clearly having some kind of water problem.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKMWRXQkhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención de la gente de playa. Soy socia desde hace años pedí para limpiar el parabrisas y ni siquiera me responden. Son muy mal educados.

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff are terrible. I've been a member for years and asked them to clean my windshield, and they didn't even respond. They're very rude.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKMmJpLWt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
En mi caso fui para solicitar la licencia de conductor internacional y la atencion fue estupenda. Super recomendable para quienes quieran hacer este tramite.

(Translated by Google)
In my case, I went to apply for an international driver's license and the service was excellent. Highly recommended for anyone wanting to complete this process.
